<script>
window.toggleLore = function(toggleEl) {
  const card = toggleEl.closest('.char-card');
  const body = card.querySelector('.char-lore-body');
  
  // Use explicit style checks to bypass CSS class conflicts
  if (body.style.display === "block" || body.classList.contains('open')) {
    body.style.display = "none";
    body.classList.remove('open');
    toggleEl.classList.remove('open');
  } else {
    body.style.display = "block";
    body.classList.add('open');
    toggleEl.classList.add('open');
  }
};

const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      entry.target.classList.add('revealed');
      observer.unobserve(entry.target);
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.05, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });

document.querySelectorAll('.char-card').forEach((el, i) => {
  el.style.transitionDelay = (i * 0.08) + 's';
  observer.observe(el);
});

document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    this.classList.add('active');
    const filter = this.dataset.filter;
    document.querySelectorAll('.char-card').forEach(card => {
      const tags = card.dataset.tags || '';
      if (filter === 'all' || tags.includes(filter)) {
        card.style.display = '';
      } else {
        card.style.display = 'none';
      }
    });
  });
});

const inputEl = document.getElementById('search-input');
const overlayEl = document.getElementById('search-results-overlay');

const searchData = [
  { title: 'Ignis / Lucidus — Mercenary', section: 'Characters', excerpt: 'Subject I-3. Most stable experiment. Enhanced physically. True name suppressed. Three paths.', href: 'characters.html#ignis' },
  { title: 'Funeris — Cultist', section: 'Characters', excerpt: 'Subject F-7. Expelled at nine. Lowest MS resistance. Attuned to Caligo. Three paths.', href: 'characters.html#funeris' },
  { title: 'Pluvia — Shaman', section: 'Characters', excerpt: 'Foresight ability. Starting MS 30. Sees the Mercenary three weeks before he arrives.', href: 'characters.html#pluvia' },
  { title: 'Konrad — Merchant', section: 'Characters', excerpt: 'Witness to the orphanage. Twenty years of guilt made into a case against the Church.', href: 'characters.html#konrad' },
  { title: 'Father Calum — Priest', section: 'Characters', excerpt: 'Subject C-1. First success. Became the administrator. MS Resistance 1/3. The man who made them all.', href: 'characters.html#calum' },
];

(function() {

  var SPRITE_FRAME_DURATION = 1000; 

  var SPRITE_SETS = {
    'char-sprite-ignis':   ['http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Copy-of-elucidate_atk_sprite_mercenary_down_001.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/elucidate_mercenary_sprite_idle_up.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/elucidate_mercenary_sprite_idle_right.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/elucidate_mercenary_sprite_idle_left.png',],
	
    'char-sprite-funeris': ['http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Copy-of-elucidate_sprite_cultist_hood_001-5.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/elucidate_sprite_cultist_up_001.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/elucidate_sprite_cultist_right_004.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/elucidate_sprite_cultist_left_003.png'],
	
    'char-sprite-pluvia':  ['http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/elucidate_attack_shaman_down_001.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Copy-of-elucidate_sprite_shaman_up_001.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Copy-of-elucidate_sprite_shaman_right_004.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Copy-of-elucidate_sprite_shaman_left_003.png'],
	
    'char-sprite-konrad':  ['http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/elucidate_attack_merchant_down_001.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/elucidate_attack_merchant_up_002.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/elucidate_attack_merchant_right_002.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Copy-of-elucidate_sprite_merchant_left_001.png'],
	
    'char-sprite-calum':   ['http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/elucidate_attack_priest_down_001.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Copy-of-elucidate_sprite_priest_up.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Copy-of-elucidate_sprite_priest_right.png', 'http://elucidate.unaux.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Copy-of-elucidate_sprite_priest_left.png']
  };

  var frameCounters = {};

  Object.keys(SPRITE_SETS).forEach(function(id) {
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;

    frameCounters[id] = 0;

    setInterval(function() {
      var frames = SPRITE_SETS[id];
      frameCounters[id] = (frameCounters[id] + 1) % frames.length;
      var nextFrame = frames[frameCounters[id]];

      el.src = nextFrame;
      el.alt = 'Character Idle Sprite — Frame ' + (frameCounters[id] + 1);
    }, SPRITE_FRAME_DURATION);
  });

})();


function escapeHtml(str) {
  return str.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');
}
function highlightMatch(text, q) {
  const idx = text.toLowerCase().indexOf(q);
  if (idx < 0) return escapeHtml(text);
  return escapeHtml(text.slice(0,idx)) + '<mark class="search-highlight">' + escapeHtml(text.slice(idx, idx+q.length)) + '</mark>' + escapeHtml(text.slice(idx+q.length));
}

function performSearch() {
  const q = inputEl.value.trim().toLowerCase();
  overlayEl.innerHTML = '';

  const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.char-card');
  const noResults = document.getElementById('no-results');
  let visibleCount = 0;

  cards.forEach(card => {
    const searchStr = (card.dataset.search || '') + ' ' + (card.querySelector('.char-name')?.textContent || '');
    if (!q || q.length < 2 || searchStr.toLowerCase().includes(q)) {
      card.style.display = '';
      visibleCount++;
    } else {
      card.style.display = 'none';
    }
  });

  noResults.classList.toggle('visible', visibleCount === 0 && q.length >= 2);

  if (!q || q.length < 2) { overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); return; }

  const results = searchData.filter(item =>
    item.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) || item.excerpt.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  ).slice(0, 6);

  if (!results.length) {
    overlayEl.innerHTML = '<div class="search-no-result">No results for "' + escapeHtml(q) + '"</div>';
  } else {
    results.forEach(item => {
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'search-result-item';
      div.innerHTML = `<div class="sr-title">${highlightMatch(item.title, q)} <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-dim);margin-left:6px;">${item.section}</span></div><div class="sr-excerpt">${highlightMatch(item.excerpt.slice(0,80)+'…', q)}</div>`;
      div.onclick = () => { window.location.href = item.href; overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); };
      overlayEl.appendChild(div);
    });
  }
  overlayEl.classList.add('visible');
}

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.char-card').forEach(card => {
    card.style.opacity = "1";
    card.style.transform = "translateY(0)";
    card.classList.add('revealed');
  });
});
});
</script>
</body>

}

  content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent); opacity: 0.5;
}
.page-hero-tag { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold-muted); margin-bottom: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
.page-hero-tag::before, .page-hero-tag::after { content: ''; display: block; height: 1px; width: 40px; background: var(--gold-muted); opacity: 0.6; }

.page-hero-title .accent { color: var(--gold-pale); }

.page-hero-line { width: 80px; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), transparent); margin-bottom: 20px; }
