const inputEl   = document.getElementById('search-input');
const overlayEl = document.getElementById('search-results-overlay');

function performSearch() {
  const q = inputEl.value.trim().toLowerCase();
  overlayEl.innerHTML = '';
  if (!q || q.length < 2) { overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); return; }

  const results = loreSearchIndex.filter(item =>
    item.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    item.excerpt.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    item.section.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  ).slice(0, 10);

  if (!results.length) {
    overlayEl.innerHTML = '<div class="search-no-result">No results found for "' + escapeHtml(q) + '"</div>';
  } else {
    results.forEach(item => {
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'search-result-item';
      div.innerHTML = `<div class="sr-title">${highlightMatch(item.title, q)} <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-dim);margin-left:6px;">${item.section}</span></div><div class="sr-excerpt">${highlightMatch(item.excerpt.slice(0,90) + '…', q)}</div>`;
      div.onclick = () => {
        const target = document.getElementById(item.id);
        if (target) target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
        overlayEl.classList.remove('visible');
        inputEl.value = '';
      };
      overlayEl.appendChild(div);
    });
  }
  overlayEl.classList.add('visible');
}

function highlightMatch(text, q) {
  const idx = text.toLowerCase().indexOf(q);
  if (idx < 0) return escapeHtml(text);
  return escapeHtml(text.slice(0, idx)) +
    '<mark class="search-highlight">' + escapeHtml(text.slice(idx, idx + q.length)) + '</mark>' +
    escapeHtml(text.slice(idx + q.length));
}
function escapeHtml(str) {
  return str.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');
}

inputEl.addEventListener('input', performSearch);
inputEl.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key === 'Escape') { overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); inputEl.blur(); }
});
document.addEventListener('click', e => {
  if (!e.target.closest('.search-wrap') && !e.target.closest('#search-results-overlay')) {
    overlayEl.classList.remove('visible');
  }
});

document.querySelectorAll('.term-filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.term-filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    const filter = btn.dataset.filter;
    document.querySelectorAll('.term-card').forEach(card => {
      if (filter === 'all' || card.classList.contains(filter)) {
        card.style.display = '';
      } else {
        card.style.display = 'none';
      }
    });
  });
});

document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a => {
  a.addEventListener('click', e => {
    const target = document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));
    if (target) { e.preventDefault(); target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); }
  });
});

const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
      entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.06, rootMargin: '0px 0px -30px 0px' });

document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => {
  el.style.opacity = '0';
  el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
  el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease';
  revealObserver.observe(el);
});
</script>

<script>
const inputEl   = document.getElementById('search-input');
const overlayEl = document.getElementById('search-results-overlay');

const searchIndex = [
  { title: 'Jose Gabriel K. Baterbonia', section: 'Developer', excerpt: 'Lead Developer. Researcher BSIT 1-3. Python, C++, Documentation.', href: '#dev-grid' },
  { title: 'Ivan Rafael G. Capulong', section: 'Developer', excerpt: 'Researcher BSIT 1-3. Hardware, Networking, CSS.', href: '#dev-grid' },
  { title: 'Marc Roden D. Famero', section: 'Developer', excerpt: 'Researcher BSIT 1-3. Videography, Photoshop, Web Design.', href: '#dev-grid' },
  { title: 'Gabrielle Keira R. Tinoko', section: 'Developer', excerpt: 'Researcher BSIT 1-3. CSS, C++, Operations Management.', href: '#dev-grid' },
  { title: 'John Alwyn D.A. Vallite', section: 'Developer', excerpt: 'Lead Programmer. Full stack developer. Python, JavaScript, HTML5, Machine Learning.', href: '#dev-grid' },
  { title: 'Acknowledgements', section: 'Credits', excerpt: 'Friend and professor acknowledgments for the project.', href: '#' },
  { title: 'Rate and Suggestions', section: 'Feedback', excerpt: 'Submit your feedback and suggestions for the game.', href: '#' },
];

function escapeHtml(str) {
  return str.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');
}
function highlightMatch(text, q) {
  const idx = text.toLowerCase().indexOf(q);
  if (idx < 0) return escapeHtml(text);
  return escapeHtml(text.slice(0, idx)) +
    '<mark class="search-highlight">' + escapeHtml(text.slice(idx, idx + q.length)) + '</mark>' +
    escapeHtml(text.slice(idx + q.length));
}
function performSearch() {
  const q = inputEl.value.trim().toLowerCase();
  overlayEl.innerHTML = '';
  if (!q || q.length < 2) { overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); return; }
  const results = searchIndex.filter(item =>
    item.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    item.excerpt.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    item.section.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  ).slice(0, 10);
  if (!results.length) {
    overlayEl.innerHTML = '<div class="search-no-result">No results for "' + escapeHtml(q) + '"</div>';
  } else {
    results.forEach(item => {
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'search-result-item';
      div.innerHTML = `<div class="sr-title">${highlightMatch(item.title, q)} <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-dim);margin-left:6px;">${item.section}</span></div><div class="sr-excerpt">${highlightMatch(item.excerpt.slice(0,80) + '…', q)}</div>`;
      div.onclick = () => { if (item.href.startsWith('#')) { const el = document.querySelector(item.href); if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); } else window.location.href = item.href; overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); };
      overlayEl.appendChild(div);
    });
  }
  overlayEl.classList.add('visible');
}
inputEl.addEventListener('input', performSearch);
inputEl.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') { overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); inputEl.blur(); } });
document.addEventListener('click', e => { if (!e.target.closest('.search-wrap') && !e.target.closest('#search-results-overlay')) overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); });

const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => { if (entry.isIntersecting) entry.target.classList.add('visible'); });
}, { threshold: 0.08, rootMargin: '0px 0px -30px 0px' });
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>

<script>
const inputEl   = document.getElementById('search-input');
const overlayEl = document.getElementById('search-results-overlay');

const searchIndex = [
  { title: 'Fan Art Gallery', section: 'Fan Art', excerpt: 'Community-created artwork celebrating the world of Elucidate RPG.', href: '#fanart-grid' },
  { title: 'Placeholder Fan Art Title', section: 'Artwork', excerpt: 'Fan artwork submitted by the community. Artist: Placeholder Artist Name.', href: '#fanart-grid' },
  { title: 'Submit Fan Art', section: 'Community', excerpt: 'Share your fan artwork to be featured in the gallery.', href: '#' },
];

function escapeHtml(str) { return str.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;'); }
function highlightMatch(text, q) {
  const idx = text.toLowerCase().indexOf(q);
  if (idx < 0) return escapeHtml(text);
  return escapeHtml(text.slice(0, idx)) + '<mark class="search-highlight">' + escapeHtml(text.slice(idx, idx + q.length)) + '</mark>' + escapeHtml(text.slice(idx + q.length));
}
function performSearch() {
  const q = inputEl.value.trim().toLowerCase();
  overlayEl.innerHTML = '';
  if (!q || q.length < 2) { overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); return; }
  const results = searchIndex.filter(item => item.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) || item.excerpt.toLowerCase().includes(q) || item.section.toLowerCase().includes(q)).slice(0, 10);
  if (!results.length) {
    overlayEl.innerHTML = '<div class="search-no-result">No results for "' + escapeHtml(q) + '"</div>';
  } else {
    results.forEach(item => {
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'search-result-item';
      div.innerHTML = `<div class="sr-title">${highlightMatch(item.title, q)} <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-dim);margin-left:6px;">${item.section}</span></div><div class="sr-excerpt">${highlightMatch(item.excerpt.slice(0,80) + '…', q)}</div>`;
      div.onclick = () => { if (item.href.startsWith('#')) { const el = document.querySelector(item.href); if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); } else window.location.href = item.href; overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); };
      overlayEl.appendChild(div);
    });
  }
  overlayEl.classList.add('visible');
}
inputEl.addEventListener('input', performSearch);
inputEl.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') { overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); inputEl.blur(); } });
document.addEventListener('click', e => { if (!e.target.closest('.search-wrap') && !e.target.closest('#search-results-overlay')) overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); });

const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => { if (entry.isIntersecting) entry.target.classList.add('visible'); });
}, { threshold: 0.08, rootMargin: '0px 0px -30px 0px' });
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>

        <div class="section-header-title">Download Elucidate RPG</div>
        <div class="section-header-line"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="download-main reveal" id="download-main">
        <div class="download-title">Download Elucidate RPG</div>
        <div class="download-desc">
          Elucidate RPG is a role-playing adventure game built with Python and the Pygame framework. The game is distributed as an executable Python Pygame Launcher file — it is not a standard installed application and does not require a traditional installer.
        </div>
        <div class="download-desc" style="margin-top:8px;">
          To run the game, ensure you have Python and the Pygame library installed on your system. Simply download the file and run it directly from your local directory.
        </div>

        <div class="download-notice">
          <div class="download-notice-icon">⚠</div>
          <div class="download-notice-text">
            <strong>Important Notice</strong>
            This is an executable Python Pygame Launcher file, NOT a standard installed application. You must have Python and Pygame installed on your machine before running. The game will not launch without the required runtime environment.
          </div>
        </div>

        <p class="warning"><strong>IMPORTANT:</strong> The game is an executable Python (Pygame) file and not a standard application. Proper setup is required before running.</p>

        <a href="#" class="btn">📥&nbsp; Download Elucidate RPG</a>

        <div style="margin-top:28px;">
          <button class="dropdown-btn">📂&nbsp; Installation Guide</button>
          <div class="dropdown-content">
            <div class="install-step">
              <div class="install-step-label">Step 1 — Install Python</div>
              <p>Download Python from the <a href="#">official Python website</a>. During installation, ensure you check <strong>"Add Python to PATH"</strong> before proceeding.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="install-step">
              <div class="install-step-label"> >>> NOTE: <<< </div>
              <p>Pygame is automatically installed by the Elucidate Launcher. No manual installation is required.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="install-step">
              <div class="install-step-label">Step 2 — Run the Launcher</div>
              <p>Navigate to the folder where you downloaded the game files, then run the following command in your terminal:</p>
              <div class="install-code">python Elucidate_Launcher.py</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-header" style="margin-top:40px;" id="requirements">
        <div class="section-header-title">System Requirements</div>
        <div class="section-header-line"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="req-table-wrap reveal">
        <table class="req-table">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>Component</th>
              <th><span class="req-badge min">Minimum</span></th>
              <th><span class="req-badge rec">Recommended</span></th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr>
              <td>CPU Clock Speed</td>
              <td class="req-min">2.0 GHz</td>
              <td class="req-rec">2.6 GHz</td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <td>CPU Cores</td>
              <td class="req-min">1 Core</td>
              <td class="req-rec">2 Cores</td>
            </tr>

<script>
const inputEl   = document.getElementById('search-input');
const overlayEl = document.getElementById('search-results-overlay');

const searchIndex = [
  { title: 'Download Elucidate RPG', section: 'Download', excerpt: 'Python Pygame executable. Not a standard installer. Requires Python and Pygame.', href: '#download-main' },
  { title: 'System Requirements', section: 'Download', excerpt: 'Minimum: 2.0 GHz CPU, 1 Core, 1 GB RAM, 1 GB Storage, 1024×768 display.', href: '#requirements' },
  { title: 'Past Build Versions', section: 'Download', excerpt: 'Alpha, beta, and stable builds available for download.', href: '#past-builds' },
  { title: 'DLC Expansion Pack', section: 'Download', excerpt: 'New playable characters: Priest, Merchant, Shaman. New UI and expanded gameplay.', href: '#dlc' },
  { title: 'Priest — DLC Character', section: 'DLC', excerpt: 'New playable character available in the DLC Expansion Pack.', href: '#dlc' },
  { title: 'Merchant — DLC Character', section: 'DLC', excerpt: 'New playable character available in the DLC Expansion Pack.', href: '#dlc' },
  { title: 'Shaman — DLC Character', section: 'DLC', excerpt: 'New playable character available in the DLC Expansion Pack.', href: '#dlc' },
];

function escapeHtml(str) { return str.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;'); }
function highlightMatch(text, q) {
  const idx = text.toLowerCase().indexOf(q);
  if (idx < 0) return escapeHtml(text);
  return escapeHtml(text.slice(0, idx)) + '<mark class="search-highlight">' + escapeHtml(text.slice(idx, idx + q.length)) + '</mark>' + escapeHtml(text.slice(idx + q.length));
}
function performSearch() {
  const q = inputEl.value.trim().toLowerCase();
  overlayEl.innerHTML = '';
  if (!q || q.length < 2) { overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); return; }
  const results = searchIndex.filter(item => item.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) || item.excerpt.toLowerCase().includes(q) || item.section.toLowerCase().includes(q)).slice(0, 10);
  if (!results.length) {
    overlayEl.innerHTML = '<div class="search-no-result">No results for "' + escapeHtml(q) + '"</div>';
  } else {
    results.forEach(item => {
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'search-result-item';
      div.innerHTML = `<div class="sr-title">${highlightMatch(item.title, q)} <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-dim);margin-left:6px;">${item.section}</span></div><div class="sr-excerpt">${highlightMatch(item.excerpt.slice(0,80) + '…', q)}</div>`;
      div.onclick = () => {
        if (item.href.startsWith('#')) { const el = document.querySelector(item.href); if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); }
        else window.location.href = item.href;
        overlayEl.classList.remove('visible');
      };
      overlayEl.appendChild(div);
    });
  }
  overlayEl.classList.add('visible');
}
inputEl.addEventListener('input', performSearch);
inputEl.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') { overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); inputEl.blur(); } });
document.addEventListener('click', e => { if (!e.target.closest('.search-wrap') && !e.target.closest('#search-results-overlay')) overlayEl.classList.remove('visible'); });

const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => { if (entry.isIntersecting) entry.target.classList.add('visible'); });
}, { threshold: 0.06, rootMargin: '0px 0px -30px 0px' });
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-btn').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const content = btn.nextElementSibling;
    btn.classList.toggle('open');
    content.classList.toggle('open');
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
